summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the CapyMatch Momentum Recap page content architecture refinement. All backend API tests (16/16) and frontend UI tests passed. Key validations: new fields (biggest_shift, ai_insights array, top_priority_program_id), deduplication (Emory NOT in Momentum Shift), section order, visual hierarchy, and mobile responsiveness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content architecture refinement testing complete. All new fields verified: biggest_shift, ai_insights (array of 5 bullets), top_priority_program_id. DEDUPLICATION VERIFIED: Emory University (top priority, cooling off) appears ONLY in 'What To Do' section and NOT in 'Momentum Shift' section. Cooling Off group is empty because Emory was filtered. Visual hierarchy confirmed: Priority cards have 4px border + shadow, Momentum cards have 2px border + no shadow. Section order: Summary hero → What To Do → Momentum Shift → Insight.

backend_api_new_fields: biggest_shift field present with school name and reason
ai_insights is array of 5 bullet strings (not paragraph)
recap_hero follows new format (not old 'You gained momentum...' pattern)
frontend_deduplication: Emory University appears in 'What To Do' section as Top Priority
Emory University does NOT appear in 'Momentum Shift' section
Cooling Off group is empty (Emory was the only cooling item and was filtered)
4 schools in Momentum Shift: Stanford, Florida, UCLA, Creighton
frontend_visual_hierarchy: Priority cards: 4px border, box-shadow, white background, 16px padding
Momentum cards: 2px border, no shadow, semi-transparent background, 12px padding
AI Insight section: softest styling with subtle background
frontend_ui_elements: Priority items show arrow (→) before reason text
Momentum items show action_guidance (e.g., 'Follow up within 48 hours')
AI Insights render as 5 individual bullet points
mobile_responsiveness: All sections render correctly at 390px width
